enrichment.summary: Kyle does a late-night vlog check-in from Boulder at around 2:40am, noting he missed his usual daily vlog. He mentions postponed work with a council, spending the day building a biking-related page on his website, and plans to go bike touring in about a month.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: excited to start, planning to go office biking in about a month
uses it but notes tolerance has made it hard to get high
